Our Programs 🎓

Programs We Offer

Designed for every age and stage — from tiny learners to young champions.

🌳

Brain Tree

A holistic early-learning program that nurtures cognitive growth, creativity, and curiosity in young minds.

🎒 LKG & UKG
🧮

Abacus

Master mental arithmetic with the abacus — build lightning-fast calculation speed and sharpen both brain hemispheres.

👦 Age 5 – 12
🔢

Vedic Maths

Ancient Indian techniques that make complex calculations simple, fast, and fun for every student.

👦 Age 10+
🏆

Maths Olympiad

Structured competitive training to help kids excel at school-level Maths Olympiads and build problem-solving confidence.

📚 Class 1 – 4
🎨

Drawing

Spark imagination and fine-tune motor skills through guided drawing sessions that bring out the little artist in every child.

✏️ All Ages
🔤

Phonics

Build strong reading and pronunciation foundations with our structured phonics program — the key to confident English literacy.

📖 Early Learners
✍️

Handwriting

Improve letter formation, pen grip, and neatness with our step-by-step handwriting improvement program.

📝 All Ages
